extensions.name: CRM
extensions.author: Anthril
extensions.description: Light CRM transform: contact / company / deal frontmatter schemas plus filters for Hot Leads, Pipeline, and Recent Touchpoints.

extensions.name: Kanban View
extensions.author: Anthril
extensions.description: Renders any section as a kanban board, columnising pages by their `status` frontmatter. Drag a card to update its status.

extensions.name: Project Management
extensions.author: Anthril
extensions.description: Project / milestone / task frontmatter schemas plus rolled-up status reports.

plugins.name: Dataview Lite
plugins.author: Anthril
plugins.description: Embed live page lists in any wiki page. Mirrors a tiny subset of Obsidian's Dataview — frontmatter-driven `from <folder>` / `where <key> = <value>` queries rendered into the host page.

plugin_templates.name: Engineering Ops
plugin_templates.description: SaaS / platform team — features, systems, runbooks, ADRs

plugin_templates.name: Research Wiki
plugin_templates.description: Reading + synthesis — articles, summaries, concept entities

plugin_templates.name: Book Companion
plugin_templates.description: Book reading — chapters, characters, themes, timeline

plugin_templates.name: Personal Knowledge Graph
plugin_templates.description: Zettelkasten — atomic notes, dense linking, daily journal, source notes

plugin_templates.name: Company
plugin_templates.description: Internal company KB — people, teams, decisions, meetings, OKRs

plugin_templates.name: Tasks
plugin_templates.description: Task management — Kanban + Calendar + Timeline driven by frontmatter
